title: vatica javanica subsp. scaphifolia
intro: Vatica javanica subsp. scaphifolia, also known as the 'Scaphifolia' or 'Sumatran Yellow Meranti', is a subspecies of the Vatica javanica tree that is native to the tropical regions of Sumatra, Indonesia. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its bark, which contains various compounds with potential health benefits. The health benefits of Vatica javanica subsp. scaphifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing its bark into teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
